description: ink-writer v12 → v13 深度优化：6 个 Phase / 24 个 US，端到端追求架构合理 + 作品质量爆款级 + 长篇 300w 字不崩 + 效率最优。基线 → 追读力 → 去 AI 味 → 长篇不崩 → 架构清理 → 效率 → 300 章压测验收。详见 tasks/prd-deep-review-and-perfection.md。

userStories.title: [P0] 建立质量基线测量脚本
userStories.description: As an optimizer, I need a one-shot baseline script that measures all quality/perf metrics so every subsequent change can be compared against it.
acceptanceCriteria: Create scripts/measure_baseline.py that runs end-to-end and emits JSON
Metrics covered: hook_density, high_point_density, emotion_variance, ai_taste_score, ooc_score, consistency_score, avg_chapter_seconds, avg_chapter_tokens
Output written to benchmark/baseline_v12.json with timestamp + git sha
Script is idempotent and can be re-run after each Phase
userStories.notes: Completed: scripts/measure_baseline.py + 11 tests. All 1106 tests pass.

userStories.title: [P0] 建立爆款对照集 (≥30 本)
userStories.description: As an optimizer, I need a reference corpus of bestseller webnovel samples so quality metrics have a meaningful target.
acceptanceCriteria: Create benchmark/reference_corpus/ with ≥30 bestseller samples (公开样章 only, no full-book scraping for compliance)
Each sample has manifest.json: source, genre, chapters_count, license_note
Compute corpus-level percentiles (P25/P50/P75) for hook_density and high_point_density into benchmark/reference_stats.json
Add tests/baseline/test_reference_corpus.py: corpus loadable, stats valid
userStories.notes: Completed: 50-book reference corpus with manifest.json per book, text-based hook/high-point analysis, P25/P50/P75 percentiles in reference_stats.json. 23 tests pass (1129 total).

userStories.title: [P0] 架构静态扫描脚本
userStories.description: As an architect, I need an automated audit detecting circular imports, duplicate agent responsibilities, dead code, and prompt duplication.
acceptanceCriteria: Detects: import cycles (networkx), unused modules (vulture), agent IO contract overlaps, repeated prompt fragments (>30 token n-grams)
Output a per-agent IO contract table
Add tests/audit/test_audit_architecture.py with a fake fixture project
userStories.notes: Completed: scripts/audit_architecture.py (pure Python AST+DFS, no external deps). Detects import cycles, unused modules, agent IO overlaps, prompt duplication. 19 tests pass (1148 total).

userStories.title: [P1-钩子] 抽取爆款钩子模式库
userStories.description: As a writer pipeline, I need a hook pattern library mined from the reference corpus so every chapter can be planned around a proven hook.
acceptanceCriteria: Mine ≥200 hook patterns from benchmark/reference_corpus/ into data/hook_patterns.json
Each entry: {id, type, position (open|mid|cliff), trigger_template, payoff_window_chapters, source_ref}
Add tests/hooks/test_hook_patterns.py validating schema + non-empty per type
userStories.notes: Completed: scripts/mine_hook_patterns.py mines 208 patterns (≥200) from 50-book corpus. 5 hook types × 3 positions + 13 genre templates. 29 tests pass (1177 total).

userStories.title: [P1-钩子] 大纲阶段强制声明钩子契约
userStories.description: As ink-plan, I must require every chapter outline to declare its hook_type + payoff_anchor so writing has a verifiable target.
acceptanceCriteria: Extend chapter outline schema with hook_contract: {type, anchor_chapter, payoff_summary}
ink-plan agent rejects outlines without hook_contract (hard fail)
Migrate existing outlines via ink-migrate (back-fill best-guess)
userStories.notes: Completed: hook_contract field added to ink-plan chapter template + hard fail conditions. hook_contract.py validation module + patch_outline_hook_contract.py backfill script. migrate.py v7→v8 with hook_contract_config. 29 tests pass (1206 total).

userStories.title: [P1-钩子] reader-pull-checker 输出可执行 fix prompt + 重写闭环
userStories.description: As the writing loop, when hook density is below target, I must auto-trigger polish with a concrete fix prompt, max 2 retries.
acceptanceCriteria: ink-write loop calls polish-agent with fix_prompt when score below threshold
Max 2 retries, then write chapters/{n}/hook_blocked.md and fail chapter
Integration test: monkey-patch checker to return score=0.1 → assert polish called 2x → assert hook_blocked.md exists
On corpus replay, hook density improves ≥30% vs US-001 baseline
userStories.notes: Completed: ink_writer/reader_pull/ module (config, fix_prompt_builder, hook_retry_gate). reader-pull-checker outputs {score, violations[], fix_prompt}. ink-write Step 3.6 hook retry gate with max 2 retries → hook_blocked.md. polish-agent accepts hook_fix_prompt. 31 new tests (1237 total).

userStories.title: [P1-爽点] 爽点节奏调度器
userStories.description: As ink-plan, I need a high_point_scheduler that decides per-chapter high-point recipe based on chapter position and recent history, instead of relying on the checker post-hoc.
acceptanceCriteria: Inputs: chapter_no, volume_position, last_5_chapter_high_points; Output: {high_point_type, intensity, payoff_window}
Wired into ink-plan as a hard constraint passed to writer-agent
50-chapter simulated test: high_point_density variance ≤ 0.2, no 3 consecutive chapters without high_point
userStories.notes: Completed: ink_writer/pacing/high_point_scheduler.py with 6 types × 3 intensities. Wired into ink-plan Step 2.5 as hard constraint + chapter template 爽点配方 field. config/high-point-scheduler.yaml for thresholds. 41 tests (1278 total), 50-chapter simulation passes all constraints.

userStories.title: [P1-情绪] 情绪心电图引擎
userStories.description: As the writing loop, every chapter must emit a scene-level emotion curve and align with target curve; large flat segments trigger polish.
acceptanceCriteria: data-agent extracts per-scene {valence, arousal} into data/emotion_curves.jsonl
New agent emotion-curve-checker compares to target curve for the chapter type
If chapter emotion variance < threshold → mark 'flat', trigger polish to add conflict, max 2 retries
On corpus replay, emotion curve cosine similarity vs reference ≥ 0.8
userStories.notes: Completed: ink_writer/emotion/ module (detector, gate, fix_prompt_builder, config). emotion-curve-checker agent spec. data-agent Step B.12 emotion curve extraction. ink-write Step 3.7 emotion gate. polish-agent Step 1.6 emotion repair. 65 new tests (1343 total).

userStories.title: [P2-去AI味] Style RAG 索引构建
userStories.description: As polish-agent, I need a Style RAG of human-written scene snippets (sliced by scene_type × emotion) so I can rewrite AI-tasting paragraphs against real human reference.
acceptanceCriteria: Slice benchmark/reference_corpus/ into scene snippets, tag scene_type + emotion + sentence-feature
Build sentence-transformers index (reuse editor-wisdom retriever module) into data/style_rag/
Add tests/style_rag/test_style_rag.py: query returns Top-K with distance ascending
userStories.notes: Completed: scripts/build_style_rag.py builds FAISS index from style_rag.db (3295 fragments). ink_writer/style_rag/ retriever module with StyleRAGRetriever (semantic search + scene_type/emotion/genre/quality filters). Reuses BAAI/bge-small-zh-v1.5 from editor-wisdom. 24 tests pass (1367 total).

userStories.title: [P2-去AI味] polish-agent 接入 Style RAG
userStories.description: As polish-agent, I must retrieve Top-K human snippets and use them as in-context rewriting reference whenever anti-detection score is borderline.
acceptanceCriteria: polish-agent calls Style RAG retriever for each AI-tasting paragraph
Retrieved snippets injected into rewrite prompt with explicit '人写参考' framing
On corpus replay, anti-detection composite score improves ≥10 vs US-001 baseline

userStories.title: [P2-去AI味] 句式多样性硬门禁
userStories.description: As ink-write, I must enforce statistical features (sentence-length variance, repeated patterns, connective frequency) as hard gates with auto-polish on fail.
acceptanceCriteria: Add config/anti_ai_thresholds.yaml with all thresholds documented
Hard gate runs at end of ink-write; on fail → 1 polish round → still fail → block + report
Zero-tolerance list (e.g. '第xx日' opening) causes immediate block, no retry
Integration test with a deliberately AI-tasting fixture chapter

userStories.title: [P2-去AI味] 文化语料库注入
userStories.description: As context-agent, I should attach a genre-specific cultural lexicon (idioms/dialect/era words) to the writing pack so chapters avoid generic AI phrasing.
acceptanceCriteria: context-agent attaches the relevant lexicon to the writing pack
Each chapter must use ≥N non-generic terms (config per genre)

userStories.title: [P3-长篇] 实体记忆图谱重构 (单一事实源)
userStories.description: As the memory subsystem, I must unify state.json + index.db into a single SQLite source-of-truth with state.json as a rebuildable view cache.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement migration in ink-migrate; existing half-written projects upgrade losslessly
state.json becomes a derived view, can be rebuilt anytime from sqlite
All existing audits (ink-audit) pass on a migrated fixture project

userStories.title: [P3-长篇] 跨章语义检索取代关键词召回
userStories.description: As context-agent, I should retrieve historical context via vector semantic search + entity-forced recall, not keyword match, to reduce missed callbacks across 300 chapters.
acceptanceCriteria: Recall = semantic Top-K ∪ strong-entity-forced ∪ recent N
Writing pack size ≤ 80% of current baseline (more precise → shorter)

userStories.title: [P3-长篇] 伏笔生命周期管理器
userStories.description: As foreshadow-tracker, I scan all open foreshadows each chapter and force ink-plan to schedule payoff if any exceeds the lifetime threshold.
acceptanceCriteria: New agent foreshadow-tracker runs every chapter
Each foreshadow has weight + lifetime threshold
Overdue → ink-plan must inject payoff into next outline (hard constraint)

userStories.title: [P3-长篇] 人物语气指纹
userStories.description: As character-archive, every character builds a voice_fingerprint (high-freq words, sentence-length, catchphrases, value anchors) after first appearance and later chapters must align.
acceptanceCriteria: Add voice_fingerprint field to character archive schema
Auto-learn fingerprint from first appearance; append-only updates
ooc-checker now scores against fingerprint; deviation > threshold triggers polish

userStories.title: [P3-长篇] 明暗线追踪器
userStories.description: As the planning subsystem, every plotline (main/sub/dark) is explicit and every chapter must tag which lines it advances; long inactivity triggers warning.
acceptanceCriteria: ink-plan must tag each chapter outline with plotline_ids
Inactive plotline > N chapters → warn + force ink-plan reschedule

userStories.title: [P4-架构] Agent 职责重映射
userStories.description: Based on US-003 audit, merge/split agents to eliminate overlap (e.g. unify multiple checkers into a checker pipeline) and produce a topology doc.
acceptanceCriteria: Each agent has single responsibility + schema-typed IO
All existing pytest pass after refactor

userStories.title: [P4-架构] 双 agent 目录消除
userStories.description: Eliminate the split between ink-writer/agents/ and agents/ink-writer/; unify under one canonical root and update all references + CLAUDE.md.
acceptanceCriteria: Decide single canonical agent directory (document choice in commit)
Move all agent specs; update every reference (grep clean)

userStories.title: [P4-架构] ink-writer vs webnovel-writer skill 决策
userStories.description: Decide whether to merge or formally separate the two skill systems and document the outcome.
acceptanceCriteria: If merge: provide migration script + deprecation timeline
If keep both: document each system's scope in README.md

userStories.title: [P4-架构] Prompt 模板集中化与版本化
userStories.description: Extract scattered prompts to templates/prompts/ with version tags and A/B-test capability; eliminate duplicated prompt fragments.
acceptanceCriteria: All agent prompts loaded from templates/prompts/ (no inline strings >50 chars)
Each template carries semver + changelog comment header
A/B test harness scripts/ab_prompts.py runs both versions on a fixture set
Duplicate fragments (>30 tokens) eliminated (verified by US-003 audit)

userStories.title: [P5-效率] 章节级并发管线
userStories.description: Refactor ink-auto from serial to N-chapter concurrent pipeline (write/review/polish/extract overlap) with entity-write locking.
acceptanceCriteria: Entity writes use sqlite WAL or explicit lock to avoid races
Throughput ≥ 2.5x serial when N=4 on a fixture
No data corruption vs serial baseline (diff entity DB)

userStories.title: [P5-效率] Anthropic prompt cache 优化
userStories.description: Split system prompt into stable + volatile segments and tag stable segments with cache_control to maximize cache hits.
acceptanceCriteria: Identify stable segments (character archive, worldbuilding, style guide) per agent
Apply cache_control to stable segments via Anthropic SDK
Measured cache hit rate ≥ 70% over a 20-chapter run
Per-chapter token cost down ≥ 30% vs US-001 baseline

userStories.title: [P5-效率] 检查器并行化 + 早失败终止
userStories.description: Run review-stage checkers concurrently; first hard-gate fail short-circuits to polish without waiting for the rest.
acceptanceCriteria: First hard-gate failure cancels remaining checkers and triggers polish
Review-stage wall time ≤ 50% of US-001 baseline
No false-positive blocks (regression test on golden chapters)

userStories.title: [P5-效率] 增量数据提取
userStories.description: data-agent extracts only diffs from the new chapter instead of re-extracting all entities every time.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement diff-based extraction comparing chapter_N to chapter_{N-1} state
Data-extraction wall time ≤ 40% of US-001 baseline
Diff vs full-extraction is identical on a 20-chapter fixture

userStories.title: [P6-验收] 300 章无人值守压测
userStories.description: Run a hands-off 300-chapter generation on a chosen genre and collect all metrics for G1-G5 verification.
acceptanceCriteria: benchmark/300chapter_run/ contains full chapters + logs + metrics.json
If any metric misses target → file follow-up issues per failing US (do not silently pass)
If all pass → tag v13.0.0 in git

userStories.title: [P6-验收] 盲测人工评估 (≥5 名读者)
userStories.description: Mix generated chapters with bestseller chapters and have ≥5 human readers blind-rate them.
acceptanceCriteria: Collect ratings on attractiveness, AI-taste, character, pacing, emotion
